untranslatable_reason: Signal requires specific volatility spike threshold and normalization threshold, neither of which are provided in the source text. Used ATR > HVol as a proxy for volatility spike detection, but exact entry/exit thresholds cannot be determined. The signal is directionally ambiguous regarding portfolio weight adjustment magnitude and specific volatility metrics.
translation_notes: This is a risk management signal requiring position sizing reduction on volatility spikes. Interpreted 'volatility spike' using ATR (Average True Range) as a volatility proxy compared to historical volatility. Entry triggers when current volatility (ATR_14) exceeds 20-period historical volatility baseline. Exit when volatility normalizes back below that baseline. Applied to BOTH directions as the signal indicates risk reduction regardless of market direction. Parameters remain underspecified in source material.
